prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Block/brick laying, part of the Concrete & Masonry scope. The observed field condition is: joints not tooled concave (water entry). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: TMS 402/602.
title: Identification: Block/brick laying (residential job)
